summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Blog admin with Tiptap rich text editor and Armory page e-commerce style product cards. All features working correctly.

issues: Existing blog content uses markdown-style formatting (**bold**) which renders as plain text with asterisks. New posts created with Tiptap will use proper HTML.

critical_code_review_comments: BlogPost.jsx has dual rendering: HTML detection for Tiptap content and markdown fallback for legacy content - good approach
AdminBlogTab.jsx properly implements Tiptap with all required extensions (StarterKit, Link, Image, TextAlign, Underline, Highlight)
TheDen.jsx (Armory) correctly implements e-commerce style product cards with hover effects and filter tabs
seed_data_creation: Created and cleaned up TEST_Automated Blog Post for testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Blog admin uses Tiptap rich text editor (replaced react-quill due to React 19 compatibility). Armory page at /services displays product cards with hover effects. All API endpoints working correctly.

details: New Post modal opens correctly
Tiptap rich text editor toolbar displays with all buttons (H1-H3, Bold, Italic, Underline, Highlight, Lists, Alignment, Quote, Code, Link, Image)
Post creation with title, content, and Published status works
Post appears in posts list after creation
Toast notification shows 'Post created'
Product cards display with image, title, description, and price
Filter tabs work (All Products, Apps, Templates, Downloads, Courses, eBooks)
Product cards have hover effects with 'View Details' overlay
Featured badges display correctly
Free/pricing labels display correctly
Blog posts list displays correctly at /blog
Tag filters work (ALL, CAST, CREW, FILM, PRODUCTION, ROLES)
Individual blog post pages render HTML content from rich text editor
GET /api/blog - returns all posts
GET /api/blog?status=Published - filters by status
POST /api/blog - creates new post
PUT /api/blog/{id} - updates post
DELETE /api/blog/{id} - archives post
GET /api/blog/slug/{slug} - fetches by slug
GET /api/den-items?item_type={type} - filters by type (Apps, Templates, Downloads, Courses, eBooks)
